text.title: Platform Team Charter Template Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for platform-team-charter-template showing inputs, rule application, and final artefact.

good.description: Charter names 'product engineering teams' as customer. Anti-charter excludes individual-engineer requests. 4 paved-road services (CI, observability, DB, auth) with explicit SLAs. Tiered support; quarterly metrics review.

bad.description: Charter is one paragraph: 'make engineering productive'. No customer named. No anti-charter. Team becomes slack help desk in 6 months; founders ask 'what is platform doing?'.
